title: Armadillo Brush Fix
description: Adds Armadillo Modded Brush Compatibility to Fabric and Forge
body:
## For Users:
Fixes issue where modded brushes may not be capable of harvesting Armadillo Scute, one of the primary uses of Brushes!

 

Mods which require this include, but are not limited to:
- [More Brushes](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-brushes)
 

## For Developers:
As long as your brush item extends the vanilla BrushItem, this mod will fix the issue preventing armadillos from properly interacting with your brushes. No code changes necessary. NeoForge includes a fix for this by default.
